rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal values. Educ. Code §25.901 governs student prayer rights in schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative overlap.
quote: A public school student has an absolute right to individually, voluntarily, and silently pray or meditate in school in a manner that does not disrupt the instructional or other activities of the school.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed property tax change.
